insights: The market underwent a significant structural shift mid-month, moving from a baseline of ~1000 jobs to a new support level of ~1300, indicating a surge in seasonal hiring activity.
FAANG+ companies are showing strong momentum, suggesting that top-tier firms are aggressively securing new graduate talent despite broader economic volatility.
The 7-day average (1323) is significantly higher than the 30-day average (1196), confirming a strong upward trend that is likely to continue as hiring cycles mature.
